---
name: "Security / Compliance Issue"
about: "Report a security or compliance concern (NIST 800-53, CUI handling)"
title: "[Security]: "
labels: "type: security, priority: high"
assignees: ''
---

## Category

- [ ] CUI / ITAR data handling
- [ ] Audit chain integrity
- [ ] GPG provenance / signing
- [ ] Authentication / authorization
- [ ] Citation tampering
- [ ] Attestation gate bypass
- [ ] NIST SP 800-53 control mapping issue
- [ ] Other: ___

## Description

Describe the issue. **Do NOT include any actual CUI/ITAR/PII data.**

## Affected NIST Control(s)

List any NIST SP 800-53 Rev.5 controls implicated (e.g., AC-3, AU-9, SI-7).

## Impact

What's the security or compliance risk?

## Suggested Remediation

If known.

---

**NOTE:** For exploitable vulnerabilities, do NOT file a public issue. Email the maintainer directly per [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
